label: Totto Land food-island hero geography

scope.purpose: Replace the close-view generic Totto Land blockout with a chapter-gated, close-readable food-geography package while retaining the existing 34-island contract as research context.
scope.ownership_boundary: New source, GLB, sidecar, renders, contract, evidence, and focused generators only. Shared runtime manifests and app components are integration-owner work.

baseline_audit.assessment: Useful 34-island addressable macro blockout, but subsidiary geometry is intentionally generic and too small to express Cacao, Biscuits, Sweet City, or the Forest of Temptation as explorable places.
baseline_audit.upgrade_strategy: Use this hero package as the close-view replacement. Do not render old and new GLBs simultaneously at the same anchor.

anchor.name: Whole Cake Island
anchor.coordinate_policy: Reuse the app's existing Totto Land/Whole Cake scene-entry anchor only. Local model positions are presentation space, not canon cartography.

components.label_warning: The repository does not contain the remembered proper label Chocolate Town. Use this neutral component id until a direct source is added.

components.geometry_warning: The island name and gate are supported. Exact cracker terraces, perforations, and wafer towers are presentation interpolation, not claimed manga terrain.

components.negative_claim: Not a juice river, chocolate river, inland canal, or canon-accurate route bearing.

components.alias_warning: Seducing Woods is retained as a user-facing/common-memory component alias; the local chapter feed calls it Forest of Temptation.

recollection_resolution.build_decision: Built as a hero island. Food terrain forms are explicitly visual interpolation.
Built the verified entirely-chocolate island and edible settlement, but did not promote Chocolate Town as an official label.

recollection_resolution.remembered_item: river island / juice river / chocolate river / canal
recollection_resolution.build_decision: Omitted. No literal inland liquid route was modeled.
Omitted from the hero GLB rather than guessing a juice island or river.
Built as a separately gated living-forest wedge on Whole Cake Island. Exact bearing is visual interpolation.

topology.atlas_policy: Never derive local positions from deterministic atlas jitter.

chapter_logic.default_rule: The app/MapLibre layer owns chapter state and hides every node whose reveal_chapter is later than the reader chapter. The open-sea route is the sole exception: it is a default-hidden event inset that activates only inside its verified chapter-829 state window.
chapter_logic.unknown_rule: No unsupported component with a null gate is present in the GLB.

whole_cake_island: chapter-831 Forest of Temptation living-tree wedge

clips.name: totto_land_food_route_cycle
clips.behavior: Small deterministic vertical and scale breathing on the open-sea foam ribbon.
clips.canon_boundary: Ambient readability only; it does not imply current direction, liquid type, route distance, or travel speed.

animation_plan.timeline_owner: App playback chooses whether to play the ambient clip. The clip cannot advance chapter or route state.

runtime_handoff.replacement_policy: Integration owner replaces/removes the old totto-land runtime row when promoting this package. Never enable both at the same anchor.
runtime_handoff.clip_owner: Three.js AnimationMixer under persistent ambient playback
runtime_handoff.dispose_rule: Unload geometry, materials, textures, and mixer actions when the scene is hidden.

unreal_reuse.source_scale: stylized local theatre; integration defines world scale
unreal_reuse.semantic_data: Preserve component_id, reveal_chapter, gate_confidence, visual_status, route_claim, and not_a_claim node extras.
unreal_reuse.route_mapping: Open-sea foam ribbon may become a Spline Component with material/Niagara foam; never rename it as a river.
unreal_reuse.clip_mapping: Import totto_land_food_route_cycle as a looping ambient transform clip.
unreal_reuse.chapter_mapping: Map the same component ids and gates into an Unreal Data Asset/controller.
unreal_reuse.material_mapping: Rebuild neutral food materials in Unreal while preserving stable material-slot intent.

must_show: Cacao as an entirely chocolate place with edible buildings
Biscuits as its own readable island rather than a generic disc
Whole Cake Chateau, Sweet City, and a separate living forest
ordinary open sea between Cacao and Whole Cake, with its foam route shown only during the chapter-829 event inset
chapter-safe component extras on every exported mesh
must_not_show: the old and new Totto Land GLBs together
Chocolate Town as a verified official local label
a juice river, chocolate river, inland canal, or candy waterfall
100% Island before its gate is verified
exact local bearings copied from atlas jitter
food-theme interpolation presented as panel-exact terrain

acceptance_criteria: GLB contains the exact clip totto_land_food_route_cycle and no fabricated river clip.
Every exported mesh has component_id, reveal_chapter, gate_confidence, default_hidden, and visual_status extras.
totto-land-sea-route is the only default-hidden component, uses gate_confidence verified_state_window, and carries active_through_chapter 829.999 on every route node.
Every non-route component remains default_hidden false so generic later-reveal chapter gating can open it.
Whole Cake/Chateau gate at 651; Cacao and its settlement/home gate at 827; Biscuits gate at 828; Sweet City and sea route gate at 829; forest gate at 831.
No 100% Island, Chocolate Town, juice river, chocolate river, canal, or candy-waterfall component enters the GLB.
The transparent render has a real alpha channel and transparent corners.
The source .blend, GLB, sidecar, four renders, and contact sheet all match the evidence-ledger hashes.
Triangle count remains below 60000 and uncompressed GLB size below 4 MB.
Existing Totto Land source/runtime files remain byte-identical to the recorded baseline hashes.
unresolved: Direct local structured record for the remembered Chocolate Town proper label.
Panel-verified Cacao settlement street plan, Pudding home design, and coast proportions.
Panel-verified Biscuits Island terrain and settlement design beyond its verified name/theme lane.
Panel-verified position and boundary of Sweet City and the Forest of Temptation on Whole Cake Island.
Exact sailing route shape and bearing between Cacao and Whole Cake.
Any canon navigable juice/chocolate/candy river, canal, or waterfall relevant to this requested set; none is locally supported yet.
100% Island reveal chapter and any literal juice geography.
Whether later close exploration needs separate LOD0 sub-scenes rather than the current combined LOD1 hero theatre.
